title: DBAF alpha sensitivity across 4 training-free LLM hosts, LLaMA-3-8B W4A4
config: W4A4 (W and A folded with same alpha)
notes: Confirms the RTN-only alpha-sensitivity finding extends to all four training-free LLM hosts. Monotonic degradation 0.25 -> 0.5 -> 0.75 holds in every host. AWQ and SmoothQuant degrade fastest because their per-channel scale migration amplifies the fold-induced noise on outlier positions. Generated locally on A100 by /tmp/localsweep/driver.sh.
